---
title: "Media"
subtitle: "In the news"
page-layout: full
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
toc: false
#author: "DEEP Lab"
#date: "2023-03-20"
#categories: [news, job]
#image: "featured.jpeg"
#css: /custom.css
listing: 
- id: media
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, author, date, description]
  field-display-names: 
      subtitle: "Media"
#  grid-item-align: left
#  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 20px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents: media.yml
---

:::{#media}
:::

<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
